subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ2.40
question_html:
Given equimolar concentrations, which substance would produce the strongest signal in a 1H NMR spectrum?


A.  (CH3)3CH

B.  C6H6

C.  C8H18

D.  Si(CH3)4
examiners_html: 47% of the candidates identified TMS as the substance producing the strongest signal in a 1H NMR spectrum. The wording of this question was not ideal and several teachers commented on this. We do not usually refer to the strength but the area under the signal.
